_publications._publicationTitle: The ErbB inhibitors trastuzumab and erlotinib inhibit growth of vestibular schwannoma xenografts in nude mice: a preliminary study.

_contextSnippet: Cell proliferation was determined by counting the number of BrdU-positive, S100-positive VS cell nuclei from frozen sections
details: Successfully detected BrdU-positive nuclei in frozen sections for proliferation analysis in combination with S100 staining
